files.Summary: Loads and exposes application configuration (read/write).

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Abstractions.IBackupExecutionEngine
files.Summary: Defines a shared asynchronous execution pipeline for backup jobs.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Abstractions.IBackupJobController
files.Summary: Defines pause / resume / stop control operations for a backup job.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Abstractions.IBackupProgressTracker
files.Summary: Defines the progress-tracking contract for a backup job.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Abstractions.IBusinessSoftwareMonitor
files.Summary: Detects whether the configured business software is currently running.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Abstractions.IBusinessSoftwarePauseCoordinator
files.Summary: Coordinates automatic pause/resume behavior when business software is detected.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Abstractions.IJobService
files.Summary: Defines backup job management operations exposed to presentation layers.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Abstractions.ILargeFileTransferLimiter
files.Summary: Coordinates global access to large-file transfers across all running backup jobs.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Abstractions.IPriorityArbitrator
files.Summary: Defines a global priority arbitrator that manages file processing order across all backup jobs. Ensures that standard (non-priority) files are not processed while any priority files remain in the system, enforcing the v3 business rule globally.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Coordination.BusinessSoftwareMonitor
files.Summary: Detects configured business software processes from application settings.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Coordination.FilePartitioner
files.Summary: Partitions a flat list of files into a priority queue and a standard queue based on a configurable set of priority extensions.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Coordination.GlobalBusinessSoftwarePauseCoordinator
files.Summary: Global coordinator that pauses running jobs while business software is detected.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Coordination.GlobalLargeFileTransferLimiter
files.Summary: Enforces the v3 rule that only one large file (> n Ko) can be transferred at a time.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Coordination.GlobalPriorityArbitrator
files.Summary: Implements global priority arbitration across multiple backup jobs. Maintains a global counter of remaining priority files and prevents standard file processing while any priority files remain in the system, ensuring v3 business rule compliance.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Entities.BackupJob
files.Summary: Facade that aggregates the four SRP sub-components of a backup job. Public surface is unchanged so all consumers (ViewModels, engines, repositories) require no modification.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Entities.BackupJobIdentity
files.Summary: Holds the immutable identity and configuration data of a backup job.

files.Summary: Immutable progress payload emitted during backup execution.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Execution.BackupTransferOrchestrator
files.Summary: Executes the file-transfer loop for a single backup job. Depends on , , and for all state access.

files.Title: EasySave.Models.Backup.Execution.DirectProgress<T>
files.Summary: Invokes the progress callback synchronously on the calling thread, bypassing any capture. Use this when the caller already handles thread dispatching (e.g., Dispatcher.UIThread.Post).

files.Summary: Orchestrates parallel execution of multiple backup jobs with centralized supervision.
